entry.title: New: RES24-234 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF A SITE MARKER WITH PEDESTAL VALUED AT $1,432 TO THE CITY FROM LEI PUA ‘ALA QUEER HISTORIES OF HAWAI’I TO BE INSTALLED ADJACENT TO THE SHOWER TREE FRONTING THE FRANK F. FASI MUNICIPAL BUILDING.

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site
